title: The Centurion Project Scandal Ensnares the UCP
author: David Climenhaga
notes: OPINION/ANALYSIS — label in UI, corroborate facts separately. Covers NDP video evidence of UCP caucus-staff attendance at Apr 16 Centurion training meeting; Kenney's personal info displayed; Smith's 'implausible deniability'. Context for EVT-028; the UCP-meeting/Kenney-doxxing strand is STAGED (EVT-NEW-centurion-ucp-link).
